testSummary: campaign-runner 65 tests (8 unit files + 7 integration on real PG + handler) all green. Full repo 35/35 turbo tasks both cold runs. No regression in phases 2-9. Integration RUNS on real PG localhost:5433; SES+SQS mocked at boundary.
e2eSummary: Proven: full lifecycle trigger->wait->condition->action->exit across ticks; wait deferral via real sweep query; branch routing via §8 compiler against real profile_features; idempotent advance (10x Promise.all -> exactly one completion + one outbox via CAS); enrollment via segment_change_log entered with 'once' ON CONFLICT (exited->none); cross-workspace isolation; ALL sends via real dispatchOutbox (suppressed skipped, unverified refused, runner never calls SES); cross-phase journey.
notes: Scope §9B only. Reused (no re-implement): @cdp/segments buildSegmentMatch, @cdp/service-dispatcher dispatchOutbox + {outbox_id} contract, broadcast runStatementsInWorkspaceTx (asserts workspace_id $1), @cdp/db testutil. No new migration (0005). KEY FINDING: CAS on updated_at required ::text comparison — Postgres timestamptz microsecond vs JS Date millisecond precision means 'updated_at=$n::timestamptz' silently never re-matches; sweep/load/claim now compare updated_at::text for exact full-precision match. Re-enrollment 'once' structural (UNIQUE+ON CONFLICT) + decideReenrollment. Loop guard MAX_STEPS_PER_TICK=50. Teardown FK order respected. campaign-journey guards applyMigrations behind to_regclass check.
